name: vibe-security
description: Security auditing skills for AI-assisted ("vibe-coded") applications.

plugins.name: vibe-security
plugins.description: Audits codebases for security vulnerabilities common in vibe-coded apps and guides secure code generation. Orchestrator skill plus focused per-domain skills (secrets, database, auth, payments, supply chain, AI/LLM, Expo, React Native, Convex, and more).
